product.title: Example Product
features: Wireless connectivity supports a cleaner setup.
Adjustable DPI tracking supports everyday pointer control.
Includes ergonomic shell to support comfort and control.

criteria.label: Clean benefit evidence
criteria.threshold: At least 3 promoted product benefit claims across 2 evidence dimension(s) for pass

criteria.label: Visual assets
criteria.threshold: At least 1 visual asset for presentation-ready output
